executives.name: Amir Vexler
executives.background: Mr. Vexler has served as President and Chief Executive Officer since January 2024. Previously, he served as President of Orano USA from 2021 to 2023 and held various leadership roles at GE-Hitachi Nuclear Energy, including CEO of Global Nuclear Fuel.

executives.name: Kevin Harrill
executives.background: Mr. Harrill has served as Senior Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Treasurer since 2023. He previously served as Vice President and Controller of the Company from 2018 to 2023.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, Chief Financial Officer, and Treasurer

executives.name: Dennis Scott
executives.background: Mr. Scott has served as Senior Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary since 2021. He joined the Company in 2015 and previously served as Deputy General Counsel.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary

executives.name: Larry Cutlip
executives.background: Mr. Cutlip has served as Senior Vice President, Field Operations since 2021. He has been with the Company and its predecessor since 1981, holding various management positions at the Portsmouth and Paducah sites.

board_of_directors.name: Mikel Williams
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Williams has served as Chairman of the Board since 2021. He was previously the CEO of JPS Industries, Inc. and DDi Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Amir Vexler
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Centrus Energy Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Bradley Sawatzke
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Energy Northwest. He has extensive experience in nuclear power plant operations and management.

board_of_directors.name: Tina Jonas
board_of_directors.background: Former Under Secretary of Defense (Comptroller) and CFO for the Department of Defense. She has held senior positions at United Technologies and Lumina Analytics.

board_of_directors.name: William Madia
board_of_directors.background: Former Director of Oak Ridge National Laboratory and Pacific Northwest National Laboratory. He is a Vice President Emeritus at Stanford University.

sources.source_description: Centrus Energy Corp. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
